title: Set up MSW (Mock Service Worker) for API mocking
summary: Full MSW v2 integration â€” request handlers, Node.js test server for Vitest, browser service worker for dev, and Storybook addon.
declaration: I will set up MSW (Mock Service Worker) v2 for this project. MSW intercepts fetch and XHR at the network layer â€” no real requests leave the browser or test process. This integrates with Vitest for unit/integration tests, with browser devtools for local development, and with Storybook for component stories. If you need to mock at the module level instead of the network level, say so.
